description_long: This is a rustic, single-wheeled wooden handcart with a deep, rectangular load bed and two long, straight handles extending from the rear. The cart features a large spoked wheel at the front, supported by a wooden axle and reinforced with a simple frame. The load bed is bordered by moderately high wooden side panels, providing containment for loose or bulky materials. The handles are robust and slightly tapered, designed for manual pushing or pulling. The cart stands on two short wooden legs at the rear, allowing it to rest stably when not in motion. Its weathered, unfinished wood surface suggests it is built for utilitarian use in urban or garden environments.
description: A weathered wooden handcart with a single front wheel, deep load bed, and two long handles. It features high side panels and sturdy construction for manual transport.
description_view_0: Side view showing the single large front wheel, deep load bed, and both long handles extending backward.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open load bed, high side panels, and the two handles extending outward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wheel, load bed, and handles, mirroring the features of view 0.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the spoked wheel, the front edge of the load bed, and the converging handles.
